dict.string: CrateDigger needs access to your Desktop to read music folders kept there and to save converted files when you point a conversion at the Desktop.
CrateDigger needs access to your Documents folder to read music libraries and write converted files when you select Documents as the destination.
CrateDigger needs access to your Downloads folder to read music files you've placed there and to write converted files when you choose Downloads as the destination.
CrateDigger needs access to removable volumes (USB drives, SD cards) to scan music folders and write converted files when you point a conversion at one.
